input.description: Check if SPEC.md exists on disk

input.command:
git -C /Users/trakotoarisoa/TanjonaDev/voxhelp add \
  .gitignore \
  SPEC.md \
  apps/backend/src/index.ts \
  apps/backend/src/llm.ts \
  apps/backend/src/prompts.ts \
  apps/backend/src/session.ts \
  apps/backend/src/prompts/ \
  apps/backend/src/routes.ts \
  apps/web/index.html \
  apps/web/src/App.tsx \
  apps/web/src/components/ \
  apps/web/src/hooks/useWebSocket.ts \
  apps/web/src/hooks/useApi.ts \
  apps/web/src/index.css \
  apps/web/tailwind.config.js \
  apps/web/vite.config.ts \
  packages/shared/src/index.ts && echo "Staged OK"

git -C /Users/trakotoarisoa/TanjonaDev/voxhelp commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: implement VoxHelp Recruit demo (3-step flow, no auth/DB)

- Shared: replace all types with recruit-demo types (DemoStep,
  SessionConfig, JobAnalysis, TechTranslation, InterviewReport,
  new WS ClientMessage/ServerMessage)
- Backend: new prompts/ folder (job-analysis, live-assist,
  tech-translate, report); callClaudeJSON in llm.ts; REST routes
  POST /api/analyze-job and POST /api/generate-report; session.ts
  refactored with debounce + parallel tech-translation + assist
- Frontend: 3-step App.tsx (prep/live/report); PrepView with job
  analysis; LiveView with 2-col layout, TechTranslationCard,
  QuestionChecklist, ScorecardPanel; ReportView with AI report;
  useApi hook for REST calls; useWebSocket rewritten for new
  message types; light theme (#F6F7FB), Outfit font, /api proxy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

input.description: Check vad-web dist files and format

input.command: cat /Users/trakotoarisoa/TanjonaDev/voxhelp/node_modules/.pnpm/@ricky0123+vad-web@0.0.30/node_modules/@ricky0123/vad-web/package.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load(sys.stdin); print('main:', p.get('main')); print('module:', p.get('module')); print('browser:', p.get('browser')); print('exports:', json.dumps(p.get('exports', {}), indent=2))"
ls /Users/trakotoarisoa/TanjonaDev/voxhelp/apps/web/node_modules/.vite/deps/ 2>/dev/null | grep -i vad || echo "no vad cache"
input.description: Check Vite dep cache for vad-web
Check the pre-bundled vad-web file format

input.command:
head -3 /Users/trakotoarisoa/TanjonaDev/voxhelp/node_modules/.pnpm/@ricky0123+vad-web@0.0.30/node_modules/@ricky0123/vad-web/dist/bundle.min.js | cut -c1-200
# Check if it's an IIFE or ESM
grep -c "export {" /Users/trakotoarisoa/TanjonaDev/voxhelp/node_modules/.pnpm/@ricky0123+vad-web@0.0.30/node_modules/@ricky0123/vad-web/dist/bundle.min.js 2>/dev/null

input.description: Check vite cache for both problematic packages

input.command: npm show @ricky0123/vad-web dist-tags 2>/dev/null && npm show @ricky0123/vad-react dist-tags 2>/dev/null
input.description: Check latest vad-web and vad-react dist-tags

input.command: npm pack @ricky0123/vad-react@0.0.36 --dry-run 2>/dev/null | head -20 && npm show @ricky0123/vad-react@0.0.36 peerDependencies 2>/dev/null
input.description: Check vad-react files and peer deps
